title: Poblano Fajita Stir Fry
description: A flavorful, spicy, and slightly sweet stir fry featuring roasted poblanos and served with crispy tortillas.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the roasted poblanos to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Pour in the tangy stir-fry sauce and silky soy sauce (if using). Stir to coat the vegetables.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the fajitas by placing a portion of the vegetable mixture onto a tortilla and top with chopped cilantro (if using).
